_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the autocancel-trigger variant of the 0x40010004 playbook. Agent must chain: folders list-current-user → jobs list --state Faulted → jobs get → jobs history → admin audit tenant events --search <job-key>. The audit event surfaces the actor as 'System' with eventDetails referencing the auto-cancel trigger name 'kill-after-10min' and the time-budget that was exceeded.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f1e2d3c4-b5a6-7890-1234-56789abcdef0 --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs c3c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789ccccc --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy any docsai query to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent must inspect the failing job to confirm the exit code
Agent must inspect state history to distinguish operator-initiated Stop from host-side termination
Agent must query the audit log to identify the actor
